_comment: Example claude-tts config. Copy to your config location and edit. The daemon embeds safe defaults, so any omitted block still works.

voice._engine_fallback: say (macOS) / espeak (Linux): zero-dep system engine — guaranteed audio with no Python deps or network
voice._engine_note: edge-tts = Azure network voices, no local ML deps (lowest-friction default; needs the 'edge' extra). kokoro = local MLX Kokoro-82M (offline, Apple-Silicon; needs a separate mlx-audio interpreter via MLX_PYTHON). voicebox = local Voicebox app via REST.
voice.name: en-US-AvaNeural
voice._mlx_python_desc: Only for engine=kokoro: path to an interpreter with mlx-audio installed. null = resolved at runtime (env MLX_PYTHON, else python3 on PATH).

voicebox._comment: Only used when voice.engine == 'voicebox'. Local Voicebox REST API (token-free, no MCP).
voicebox._profile_id_desc: Voicebox profile id for spoken reports; null = engine default voice.
voicebox._personality_desc: true applies the profile's persona LLM rewrite (LOSSY — it can drop/alter facts). Keep false for faithful status/error readouts; reserve true for flavor.

filtering._description: Responses longer than this are summarized or skipped.

llm_provider._comment: The judge + summarize brain. type=ollama (local, default), openai (OpenAI-compatible base_url+model+api_key), or null (no-LLM deterministic floor).

summarizer._model_desc: Recommended local model. Any Ollama model works; setup-time calibration checks it. For an OpenAI-compatible backend set llm_provider.type=openai instead.
summarizer._inner_timeout_s_desc: Hard cap on a single summarize call; with max_tokens ~120 a summary lands ~1.5s.

routing._comment: ContentRouter timeouts. Wrapper timeouts are clamped in code to ALWAYS exceed summarizer.inner_timeout_s, so a mis-set value can never re-introduce raw-markdown readout.

audio._description: Prevents audio overlap across multiple Claude sessions.

advanced._comment: Advanced settings - change only if you know what you're doing.

feature_flags._comment: Runtime toggles — re-read per request, no restart needed.
